name: truverifai
description: Multi-model second-opinion deliberation for high-stakes coding decisions. Four skills (audit / deliberate / synthesize / record-outcome) route to the TruVerifAI MCP server, where four frontier models reason independently and conflict-target each other's positions to produce decision-grade output. Outcome reporting closes the loop — the dashboard shows what % of MCP calls actually changed the agent's decision.

api_token.title: TruVerifAI API key
api_token.description: Your tvai_... key. Sign up at https://truverif.ai/signup and generate a key at https://truverif.ai/settings/api-keys.

enable_adherence_telemetry.title: Enable adherence telemetry (timing only)
enable_adherence_telemetry.description: When enabled, the plugin reports the TIMING of git commits the agent runs to TruVerifAI. NEVER reported: commit messages, file paths, diff content, branch names, repo identifiers, working directory, raw commands, or commit SHAs. Used to compute the adherence card on https://truverif.ai/settings/mcp showing 'agent committed N times this week; invoked TruVerifAI M times'. Set to false to opt out entirely. Default true. See the data-handling document at https://truverif.ai/data-handling for the full disclosure.

enable_gates.title: Enable the proactive review gates
enable_gates.description: When enabled, a PreToolUse gate runs before a risky git commit (audit) or a risky design write (deliberate). It classifies the change LOCALLY and sends TruVerifAI only a repo fingerprint + hunk content hashes — never source, paths, or diffs. If the change isn't covered by a prior review it blocks and asks the agent to call audit_coding / deliberate_coding first. Fails open on any error and never deadlocks. Set to false to disable the gates entirely. Default true.

deliberate_mode.title: Deliberate gate strictness
deliberate_mode.description: 'tiered' (default) blocks only high-confidence/irreversible design forks (schema, migrations, auth, dependencies) and is advisory on lower-confidence ones; 'block' blocks every risky design write; 'advisory' never blocks (surfaces a suggestion only). The audit gate (pre-commit) is unaffected.
